changeLog: Major update: Added 28 abused RMM tools (Atera, NinjaRMM, Action1, PDQ, Level, Datto, Kaseya, ITarian, GoToResolve, TacticalRMM, N-able, ManageEngine) and 24 new RATs (Remcos, NanoCore, NetWire, Warzone, Crimson, Orcus, RevengeRAT, BlackShades, LuminosityLink, Gh0st, PoisonIvy, Adwind, StilachiRAT, ResolverRAT, Bawless, Steaelite). Added TrustConnect/DocConnect fake RMM RAT (Feb 2026 discovery). 16 new blocked signers. Total: 211 blocked executables, 43 signers.
